query:
ALTER TABLE driver_profiles
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipment_type ENUM('tow_truck', 'flatbed', 'stinger', 'seven_car_carrier') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipment_capacity TINYINT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_load BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_invite BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE;
